headline: Qualcomm Drops 21% in 2026 — Is BofA Right to Call It a Sell?
summary: Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) shares are down roughly 21% year-to-date, trading between $134 and $135 intraday on Wednesday. The stock shed another 3.65% on March 10 after a wave of analyst actions, capped by a fresh Underperform call from Bank of America (NYSE:BAC). The question now is whether the sell-side is finally catching up to a story ... Qualcomm Drops 21% in 2026 — Is BofA Right to Call It a Sell?

headline: Bank of America 2026 oil outlook: New price target issued
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America has raised its Brent crude forecast for 2026, warning that the Iran conflict has “wiped out” the global energy surplus and created a far more fragile outlook for supply and prices.

headline: Bank Of America Digital Surge Sparks Questions On Efficiency And Valuation
summary: Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) reports record digital engagement, with nearly 30 billion client digital interactions in the past year. AI assistant Erica has handled more than 3.2 billion interactions since launch, highlighting extensive client use of virtual support. Digital payment and financial wellness platforms, including Zelle and CashPro, are reaching usage records across consumer, wealth, and corporate clients. The bank links this activity to ongoing investments in AI and technology...
